_help_Name: Descriptive name of the TMeasy tire model
Name: Sedan TMeasy Tire
_help_Design: Design parameters for tire dimensions, rim size, and mass/inertia properties
_help_InflationPressure: Optional: Inflation pressure at design and use state in Pa (if both design/use are set, they scale stiffness/forces)
_help_LoadIndex: Tire load index code. Together with 'Vehicle Type', it allows TMeasy to estimate vertical/longitudinal/lateral tire curves automatically.
_help_BearingCapacity: Optional: Maximum bearing capacity in Newtons. Used if Load Index is omitted.
_help_Visualization: Mesh files for left and right tire rendering
